occurrence_sentence: The USA National Quantum Initiative Act signed at the back end of 2018 directed the implementation of a 10-year National Quantum Initiative Program aimed at accelerating progress in QIS and technology development. This included the specification that the Department of Energy should establish 2-5 National QIS Research Centers and allocate up to $25 million to each per year during the first five years of the initiative, a maximum of $625 million.

The USA National Quantum Initiative Act signed at the back end of 2018 directed the implementation of a 10-year National Quantum Initiative Program aimed at accelerating progress in QIS and technology development. This included the specification that the Department of Energy should establish 2-5 National QIS Research Centers and allocate up to $25 million to each per year during the first five years of the initiative, a maximum of $625 million.

The USA National Quantum Initiative Act signed at the back end of 2018 directed the implementation of a 10-year National Quantum Initiative Program aimed at accelerating progress in QIS and technology development. This included the specification that the Department of Energy should establish 2-5 National QIS Research Centers and allocate up to $25 million to each per year during the first five years of the initiative, a maximum of $625 million.
